inline_comments.message:
Unfortunately we cannot use this dependency. It is out of date and full of security LCM issues. In the top level parent pom.xml v4.5.5 is declared. Please use that one.

<dependency>
                        <groupId>org.apache.httpcomponents</groupId>
                        <artifactId>httpclient</artifactId>
                        <version>${httpclient.version}</version>
                </dependency>
